name: IdsEdwOpsWorkUnitDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_DB AS (SELECT WORK_UNIT.OPS_WORK_UNIT_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS RAW_SRC_SYS_CD, WORK_UNIT.OPS_WORK_UNIT_ID, WORK_UNIT.OPS_SUPVR_SK, WORK_UNIT.OPS_WORK_UNIT_DESC, WORK_UNIT.USER_ID, WORK_UNIT.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.OPS_WORK_UNIT WORK_UNIT LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON WORK_UNIT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_Main AS (SELECT OPS_WORK_UNIT_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(RAW_SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE RAW_SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, OPS_WORK_UNIT_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, OPS_SUPVR_SK, OPS_WORK_UNIT_DESC, USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_DB WHERE OPS_WORK_UNIT_SK <> 0 AND OPS_WORK_UNIT_SK <> 1), cte_unk AS (SELECT 0 AS OPS_WORK_UNIT_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'UNK' AS OPS_WORK_UNIT_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS OPS_SUPVR_SK, '' AS OPS_WORK_UNIT_DESC, 'UNK' AS USER_ID, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), cte_na AS (SELECT 1 AS OPS_WORK_UNIT_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 'NA' AS OPS_WORK_UNIT_ID, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS OPS_SUPVR_SK, NULL AS OPS_WORK_UNIT_DESC, 'NA' AS USER_ID, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM cte_Main UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_unk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_na
